events.text: Assessment complete. The missing weld is a nonconformance — a required structural connection is entirely absent relative to the drawing detail, not just a workmanship defect on an existing weld. I recorded `decision: fail`, `risk: high`, with corrective actions (NCR, hold close-out, weld per approved WPS, re-inspect/NDT per AWS D1.1, EOR/QC sign-off) written to `/app/answer.json`.
